title: Project Wrap-Up & QA Demo
concept: Testing the bot on custom questions and verifying it admits when context is missing. 'Mini Project: PDF Q&A bot is complete!'.

exercises.prompt: What should the bot do if it can't find the answer to a question?

options.text: It should say that it doesn't have enough context.
It should give a random answer.

exercises.explain: The bot should clearly communicate when it doesn't have enough context to provide an answer.

cards.title: Testing the Bot
cards.body: It's time to test your PDF Q&A bot! You will ask it some custom questions.

cards.title: Verification of Answers
cards.body: Verification means checking if the answers given by the bot are accurate and complete.

cards.title: Like a Teacher
cards.body: Think of your bot as a teacher who checks if they have enough information before answering a question.

cards.title: Example of Custom Question
cards.body: If you ask, "What is the main theme of the document?" ensure the bot has access to that part of the PDF.

cards.title: Myth: The Bot Knows Everything
cards.body: Some people think the bot knows all the answers. In reality, it only answers what it finds in the PDF.

cards.title: Response Feedback
cards.body: Here are two different responses from your bot after testing it.

left.text: The bot says, "I don’t have enough information to answer this question."

right.text: The bot provides a clear answer backed by citation.

exercises.prompt: What should you do if your bot can't answer a question due to missing information?

options.text: Update the PDF to include the answer.
Test with a different question instead.
Ignore the question and move on.

exercises.explain: If the bot cannot answer due to missing information, testing it with a different question can be more effective.

exercises.prompt: The bot should guess an answer when it doesn't have enough context.
exercises.explain: The bot should not guess; it should communicate clearly when it lacks context.

exercises.prompt: The bot must admit when it does not have enough __________ to answer a question.
exercises.sentence: The bot must admit when it does not have enough context to answer a question.
exercises.explain: The bot needs to be aware of its limitations and let users know when it lacks context.

exercises.prompt: Which of these is the AI-generated response when it lacks information?

options.text: I will take a guess and try my best!
Sorry, I don't have enough context to answer that. Can you ask something else?

exercises.explain: The correct response shows that the bot acknowledges its limits and asks for more context.

exercises.prompt: You have tested your PDF Q&A bot and found a question it can't answer. What should you do next?

options.text: Change the PDF to include the answer and test again.
Ignore the question and assume it's not important.
Keep asking more questions and hope for a different response.
Make up an answer to provide feedback.

exercises.explain: When your bot can't answer a question, reviewing the PDF to see if the answer is missing is crucial. Updating the document helps ensure your bot provides accurate information. Mini Project: PDF Q&A bot is complete!
